findings.evidence: FastAPI is present and remains suitable for typed async APIs.
findings.recommendation: Keep FastAPI as the API layer and focus on auth, pagination and observability.

findings.evidence: Streamlit is optimized for internal analytical dashboards, not polished SaaS UX.
findings.recommendation: Keep for local/internal operation; plan Next.js only if selling as public SaaS.

findings.evidence: docker-compose.yml contains a static PostgreSQL password.
findings.recommendation: Move passwords to .env variables and provide safe examples only.
Continue incremental hardening instead of a risky rewrite.
